# Concert Workflow: Medium Mission

Use this workflow for medium features. UX stage is skipped. Architecture feeds directly into task planning.

## Pipeline Stages

| Stage | Agent | Interactive | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|-------------|
| vision | concert-init | yes | Interactive interview to create VISION.md |
| requirements | concert-analyst | no | Generate REQUIREMENTS.md from accepted vision |
| architecture | concert-architect | no | Generate ARCHITECTURE.md from accepted requirements |
| tasks | concert-planner | no | Decompose approved plans into task files |
| execution | concert-continue | no | Execute task files through the code quality loop |
| verification | concert-verifier | no | Verify completed work against requirements |

**Note:** UX stage is skipped. Architecture feeds directly into task planning.

## Stage Transition Rules

Same as CONCERT-WORKFLOW-MISSION-FULL.md, with UX stage omitted.

1. Each stage produces a draft document
2. Draft must be reviewed and accepted before advancing
3. On accept: document is copied to `docs/concert/<STAGE>-SPEC.md`
4. On restart: draft is discarded, stage re-runs from scratch
5. `/concert:replan <stage>` marks downstream stages for re-run

## Review Cycle Rules

See CONCERT-WORKFLOW-REVIEW-CYCLE.md for detailed rules.

## Execution Rules

- Execution follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-EXECUTION.md
- Code quality loop follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-CODE-QUALITY.md
